title: Heartbeat-end: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4) — Director seat handed to Lunar Ascending Star at 22:04:09Z (Moment 2 in_response_to ced9997b); cron 8c3c6caf deleted; watcher blbk0hcvo stopped; standing down per owner direction
body: Director seat handed cleanly to Lunar Ascending Star (`e02cdd`) at 2026-05-24T22:04:09Z via Moment 2 broadcast (in_response_to `ced9997b`). Cron `8c3c6caf` deleted. Monitor `blbk0hcvo` stopped per owner direction. Session-end disposition: standing down from routing; no claims retained; closeout consolidation surface (6 failure-mode + behaviour-note observations) handed forward to Lunar per pre-positioning §6. Mistbound and Charcoal continuing Cycle 5 re-enqueue + wind-down per fresh owner direction "once this commit is in, pause and stop all crons and monitors". Thank you to the team.
